name: Provenance & lineage
meaning: Tracks source integrity, derivation chains, and admissibility of claims.

name: Identity integrity
meaning: Ensures actor identity, authority role, and delegation are trustworthy.

name: Runtime arbitration
meaning: Handles conflicts between competing claims or norm layers.

name: Relational dependency
meaning: Addresses downstream dependency and cross-domain coupling risk.

name: Crisis response
meaning: Coordinates emergency handling and continuity obligations.

name: Economic extraction
meaning: Identifies value capture dynamics and coercive incentive structures.

name: Platform legitimacy
meaning: Concerns constitutional legitimacy, mandate scope, and trust.

name: Synthetic labour
meaning: Governs automation obligations, welfare, and role boundaries.

name: Security boundaries
meaning: Defines containment, access constraints, and boundary protections.

name: Observability & telemetry
meaning: Ensures traceability, auditability, and accountability evidence.
